status_boundary: PASS_LEDGER_VALIDATION means the repo has a bounded PRI-002 scattering-native source-candidate queue with PG tags, DOI-backed external candidates, kill notes, and anti-promotion boundaries. It is not source ingestion, not source extraction, not scattering-native validation, not high-resonance defeat, not substrate selection, not a settling-law proof, and not engineering readiness.

support_summary.allowed_inference: the repo has an external-web-reviewed candidate queue for scattering-native comparator source review
support_summary.blocked_inference: source ingestion, source extraction, scattering-native validation, high-resonance defeat, Route A validation, CRBSM validation, substrate selection, settling-law proof, or engineering readiness
support_summary.checked_interface: PRI-002 sourced scattering-native candidate list under PG1-PG8 intake criteria
